segments.text: Hikari tends to get KO'd a lot from Ryu's up air, so juggling over here would probably be the better play. Yeah, that makes sense.
segments.original_text: ヒカリが突然多分リュウの空上から撃墜することも多いんで こっちでたぶん着地狩りした方がいいんじゃないかな なるほど

segments.text: So is this option working? Or is that meteor coming out a bit early?
segments.original_text: さあこの選択がきちゃってるか それとも不 少し早めのメテオ

full_text: Hikari tends to get KO'd a lot from Ryu's up air, so juggling over here would probably be the better play. Yeah, that makes sense. So is this option working? Or is that meteor coming out a bit early?

corrections.corrected: ヒカリが突然多分リュウ
